owner_operator_stated: Practice is owned by Dr. Ryan Kuebler and Dr. Jolynn Kuebler; site banner states 'NEW NAME, SAME OWNERSHIP, SAME QUALITY CARE!' referencing rebrand from Winfield Family Dentistry to Winfield Dental Studio
notes: Vendor hint Bogindds.Com was WRONG for this record — Bogin DDS is a different practice at 0S160 Church St, Winfield, phone (630) 668-6352, not this address. Instead, this exact address (0S200 Winfield Rd) and phone ((630) 690-1155) belong to Winfield Dental Studio, where Dr. Antonietta Caporale (the record's named provider) practices as an associate. Careers page returns 404 (no hiring page).

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Boris Kaltchev, DMD, is stated as the practice owner on BK Dental's own website
notes: Record entity 'Timothy J. Kiczenski, D.D.S., LTD.' no longer occupies this address/phone. The exact address (140 E. Commercial St, Wood Dale, IL 60191) and exact phone ((630) 766-2223) now belong to BK Dental, owned by Dr. Boris Kaltchev, DMD; Timothy Kiczenski is not mentioned anywhere on BK Dental's site. This is a successor/ownership change (retirement or sale), not the named entity's own site.

Exact address (1061 S Roselle Rd, Schaumburg, IL 60193) and exact phone ((847) 301-0400) match, but the corroborated site is branded 'The Dental Store' — 'Dental Design, Ltd.' (the record's legal name) is not mentioned anywhere on the site. The practice is now a large multi-provider group (9 general dentists + 4 specialists), well beyond the record's provider_count of 7, consistent with growth/rebrand since the LTD name was registered, but no direct documentary link between the two names was found. Site itself lists open hiring roles for Dental Hygienist and General Dentist.

owner_operator_stated: Site does not name an individual owner; footer careers link routes to Smile Brands' corporate job portal (smilebrands.com/careers), indicating DSO affiliation rather than independent solo/partner ownership
notes: Record entity 'Charles Goodsite and Thomas Seretis Ltd.' does not appear on the corroborated site despite exact address/phone match (929 W Wise Rd, Schaumburg, IL 60193 / (847) 895-0485). The site is now branded 'One Good Smile' with sole listed dentist Dr. Landon Kleingartner, DDS (associate) — no mention of Goodsite or Seretis. Careers footer link routes to Smile Brands' national careers portal, indicating this location is now Smile Brands DSO-affiliated (a multi-location national DSO brand), a likely sale/succession from the original solo-owner LTD.

public_practice_name: Crystal Dental Clinic, Ltd. (dba Today's Family Dentistry)
owner_operator_stated: Dr. Elzbieta (Ela) Stojkowski, DDS, is the practice's featured/principal dentist; the site's own header/title explicitly reads 'CRYSTAL DENTAL CLINIC, LTD', matching the record's legal name
notes: Practice operates publicly under the DBA 'Today's Family Dentistry' but the site explicitly states the legal name 'CRYSTAL DENTAL CLINIC, LTD', consistent with the record. Exact address (1752 W Wise Rd, Schaumburg, IL 60193) and exact phone ((847) 301-7950) match. Dr. Monica Kalinowski and Dr. Wieslawa Siudyla are also named in the site's Polish-language header but with no location-specific bio/role/credential — could reflect a small shared-template network of Polish-speaking family dental sites in the area; treat their affiliation to this specific location as unconfirmed beyond the name mention. No careers/hiring page found.

Vendor hint domain 'Advancedfamilydentalcare.Org' is a dead/parked placeholder ('This website is currently under construction', unrelated 888 phone number) — the practice's real live site is advfamilydentalcare.com (no 'ed' in 'Adv'). Direct WebFetch to advfamilydentalcare.com failed with 'certificate has expired' (browsers would show a security warning), but search-engine-indexed content from the site's own contact and doctor-bio pages confirms the exact address (319 S. Barrington Rd, Schaumburg, IL 60193) and exact phone ((847) 534-1100), and names Dr. Pranav Patel, DDS. No careers/hiring page found.
